patterns.pattern: Stale developer.wordpress.org URLs using the old /developers/ hierarchy (now redirected to /reference-guides/ or /how-to-guides/)
patterns.evidence: grep -rn 'developer.wordpress.org/block-editor/developers' packages/*/README.md docs/ — five hits in three package READMEs and two docs files. All currently 301-redirect; should be updated to canonical /reference-guides/ or /how-to-guides/ paths.
patterns.recommended_action: Cross-cutting fixer should grep the whole repo for 'developer.wordpress.org/block-editor/developers/' and rewrite each occurrence to its current canonical equivalent (consult docs/manifest.json or follow each 301).

patterns.pattern: Stale Google/Chrome and old-org Puppeteer URLs (GoogleChrome/puppeteer → puppeteer/puppeteer; smooth-code/jest-puppeteer → argos-ci/jest-puppeteer; developers.google.com/web/* → developer.chrome.com/*)
patterns.evidence: grep -rn 'GoogleChrome/puppeteer\|smooth-code/jest-puppeteer\|developers.google.com/web/' packages/*/README.md docs/ — only packages/scripts/README.md has these (lines 449, 453, 483, 636).
patterns.recommended_action: Fold into the scripts README fix; no other docs affected in the corpus.

patterns.pattern: theme.json examples with JSON syntax errors (missing commas / trailing commas) in WordPress vs Gutenberg codetabs
patterns.evidence: Three distinct JSON syntax errors found in one file (lines 238-244 trailing comma, 702-707 trailing comma, 776-782 missing commas). Pattern: codetabs blocks with hand-written JSON that drifts.
patterns.recommended_action: Add a CI check that lints fenced ```json blocks in docs/ against a JSON parser to catch this systematically. For now, scan the file for similar adjacent-property JSON blocks.

patterns.pattern: appearanceTools opt-in list drift between PHP source and docs
patterns.evidence: Doc lists fewer entries than APPEARANCE_TOOLS_OPT_INS in lib/class-wp-theme-json-gutenberg.php. May also affect theme.json reference docs — fixer should also check docs/reference-guides/theme-json-reference/.
patterns.recommended_action: Cross-check the appearanceTools list in docs/reference-guides/theme-json-reference/ and any other doc mentioning appearanceTools.

patterns.evidence: Checked all 12 package READMEs in the pilot for 'START TOKEN' / 'auto-generated' markers — none found. Safe to treat all pilot READMEs as hand-authored.
patterns.recommended_action: No action required for the pilot. Future runs should still pre-screen for generation tokens before dispatching fixes.
